description.zh: 全栈游戏制作人 Agent(统筹编排角色)· 策划 / 程序 / 美术 / 音效一把抓,从模糊想法陪你一路理清到落地。温柔陪伴式风格,自带「陪伴式 debug」技能(先肯定、再轻声引导)。
description.en: Full-stack game-producer agent (orchestrator role) — design, code, art and audio in one, taking you from a fuzzy idea to a shipped game. Gentle companion style, with a built-in gentle-debug skill (affirm first, then guide).

description.zh: 温柔陪伴式 debug，先肯定再引导，把 bug 当迷路的小家伙一起找回家
description.en: Companion-style debugging — affirm first, guide gently, treat bugs as lost little ones
